steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
The function gives the output for any chosen input. Plug $x=-4$ into $g(x)=-7x+58$.
$$g(-4)=-7(-4)+58$$

steps.title: Evaluate the output
steps.content:
Multiply first, then add to find the value of the function at that input.
$$g(-4)=28+58=86$$
The answer is A.
